title: IMMIGRATION COUNSELING SERVICE - 211info
text: IMMIGRATION COUNSELING SERVICE IMMIGRATION COUNSELING SERVICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal services for immigration issues such as family visa petitions, permanent residency, citizenship applications, consular processing, representation in front of USCIS (formerly INS), renewal of work permits or resident cards, asylum, and defense against removal (deportation). Also provides assistance in obtaining U and T visas. 519 SW Park Avenue Suite 610 Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Initial consultation: Unrestricted Representation by attorney or Accredited Representative: Income must be no higher than 200% of the federal poverty level Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm by appointment only Email (503) 221-1689 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 221-1689 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, visit website, or walk in for application FEES: $50 screening fee DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Accessible by MAX and TriMet. Bicycle parking available. Services: Immigration/Naturalization Legal Services If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. IMMIGRATION COUNSELING SERVICE
